verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: By the fig and the olive
verse.verse_4: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
verse.verse_5: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
verse.verse_6: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
verse.verse_7: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
verse.verse_8: Is not Allah the most just of judges?
